---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/grim-hitman0XX
---

## About This Blog

This is a 6-post series building intuition from per-sample gradients through memorization risks to cutting-edge correlated noise mechanisms in differential privacy.

**The unifying thread:** the gradient is the channel through which training data influences the model, and controlling that channel is the key to privacy.

## Target Audience

ML practitioners who know SGD but not differential privacy. No prior privacy knowledge assumed. Graduate-level depth, accessible presentation.

## Companion Code

The series is accompanied by a working implementation at [correlated_noise_mechanism](https://github.com/grim-hitman0XX/correlated_noise_mechanism).
